creator: slk@karpes.stu.rpi.edu
text:
The problem is that if you:
	configure VESA and VM86 into the kernel
	boot with a VESA resolution splash screen

	The system is unstable and will reboot.

Fix: 

a workaround is to not compile in VESA or VM86. I don't know
	of a proper fix.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Configure a kernel with VESA and VM86
	boot with a VESA resolution splash screen
	Put the system under fairly heavy load (i.e. netscape,
	realplayer, make buildworld, etc)
